# Create Diagram

[![Requires Create](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/create_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-diagram)

## About
**Create Diagram** is a Minecraft addon that provides you with a full in-game flowchart editor, perfectly integrated with the mechanics, recipes, and graphics of the Create mod and all its addons (e.g., Create: New Age).

## Required Dependencies
 - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
 - [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
 - [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

## Content
Craft the Diagram item (the recipe will change in the future), right click it and start to draw your schematics.

Within the interface you can place items from the side menu and connect them using edges, draw using the pen and line tools, or place a sticky note (shift + right click) to write custom annotations.

## Extra
If you ever found a bug or have a suggestion open an issue in my GitHub page.
